BrandOverview.heading: Kangrentang Pharmaceutical
BrandOverview.p1: Kangrentang Pharmaceutical advances herbal standardization and modernization with national-grade research systems.
BrandOverview.p2: For over 20 years, Kangrentang has focused on granule R&D and manufacturing as one of China’s earliest pilot enterprises—driving standardization and intelligent production.
BrandOverview.p3: Core technologies and IP, robust QC, and modern manufacturing transform traditional decoctions into standardized preparations.

InnovationHero.sub: From technology to production, every step is grounded in evidence and engineering.

TechInnovation.heading: “Full-spectrum” extraction
TechInnovation.coreBody: Transfers the full composition of traditional decoctions into granules—beyond partial extracts—with >98% transfer rates to preserve clinical efficacy.
TechInnovation.quoteBody: Standardized full-spectrum processing helps single-herb granule combinations mirror whole-decoction profiles for more consistent clinical outcomes.
TechInnovation.spectraCaption: FTIR fingerprint comparison — absorption peak alignment

CompareTable.heading: Why Kangrentang dry granulation stands out
CompareTable.sub: Side-by-side look at two mainstream granulation approaches—from process to clinic use.

rows.label: Granulation method
rows.a: Compress dried extract powder under pressure—no binders or excipients required
rows.b: Requires starch, dextrin, sugar, etc., forming a wet mass before drying

rows.label: Excipients
rows.a: Excipient-free for ~98% of SKUs (trace amounts only when needed for difficult herbs)—no added sugar or starch

rows.label: Active component retention
rows.b: Heat-sensitive components may degrade; excipients can affect dissolution

rows.label: Granule stability
rows.a: High purity, low hygroscopicity, fast dissolution
rows.b: Sugar/starch blends may clump and dissolve more slowly

rows.label: Taste & appearance
rows.a: Closer to traditional decoction—naturally deeper color
rows.b: Often sweeter taste and lighter color

rows.label: Who it fits
rows.a: Suitable for diabetes and low-sugar diets
rows.b: Less suitable when sugar control is required

Production.sub: Parameterized, automated processing for digital, intelligent, scalable herbal manufacturing.

processSteps.title: Sourcing & processing
processSteps.desc: Authentic materia medica with classical preprocessing to maximize actives.

processSteps.title: Extraction & concentration
processSteps.desc: Full-spectrum extraction with precise temperature control—typically >98% retention.

processSteps.title: Drying & granulation
processSteps.desc: Spray drying and fluid-bed granulation—minimal excipients, uniform granules, excellent solubility.

processSteps.title: Release testing
processSteps.desc: FTIR fingerprinting and assay per batch—complete QC documentation before release.

cards.desc: 500+ raw herb varieties covering common clinical formulas
Full-spectrum transfer rates exceeding typical market products
$0 custom processing—granules billed on raw material cost without extra packaging fees

Timeline.heading: Research journey
Timeline.sub: Since 2002, continuous investment in modern granule processes and quality standards—from classical processing to standardized preparations.

items.desc: Launched granule standardization research with end-to-end QC and early national certification.
Led national projects solving fingerprinting and quantitative assay challenges—helping set industry standards.
International quality certifications aligned with FDA/GMP norms—expanding into North America.
Evolving testing and QC standards—leading private-market granules with a North America focus.

Science.heading: Research & testing capabilities
Science.sub: Modern herbal research and analytics built on advanced instrumentation.

cards.title: Fingerprint comparison
cards.desc: FTIR fingerprints for raw materials and finished goods—large proprietary library to deter adulteration.

cards.title: Quantitative assays
cards.desc: HPLC quantitation per batch to ensure actives meet specification.

cards.title: Batch stability control
cards.desc: SPC monitoring for consistent quality aligned with clinical expectations.

cards.title: Standardized QC
